race.comment: READY AND LUCKY (1) has admittedly let punters down in her two runs back but was only beaten a lip last time and should be peaking now. Already boasts a win at this track and trip and gets the important claim again. Can go one better. ROSE WATER (9) returns after showing good signs last prep without winning, though there were plenty of subsequent winners around her. Readied with solid hit-outs and gets Morgan back on from a good draw. Think she gives this a big shake. SIRAGUSA (3) made a mess of his rivals on debut at Tamworth in January, then was immediately tipped out. Just the one soft trial off a short break. Suspect he will be right there but hard to get too excited at the short quote. AKAUWHEO (10) also deserves respect after a strong win at Gunnedah.
